candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line; preferred over duplicate total/subtotal line.
Duplicate total revenue line with identical values; useful only as fallback if labeling changes.
Not operating revenue/top-line sales; disposal gain line, not revenue.

variables.notes: Used the primary revenue line first, with the duplicate total line as fallback.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs on the income statement.
Balance sheet inventory component, not an income statement expense.

variables.notes: Selected the income statement direct cost line; excluded balance sheet inventory row.

candidates.why: Operating overhead personnel cost; valid SG&A component.
Broad operating overhead bucket; valid SG&A component when no explicit SG&A subtotal exists.
Dedicated R&D line exists, but it appears below Operating profit, so per rule it should not be added to XSGA_COMPONENTS.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal exists. Chose overhead buckets only. Excluded depreciation/amortization, impairments, and the dedicated R&D line because it appears below Operating profit in the preview.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D line exists. It appears below Operating profit, so it is mapped to XRD but not included in XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Too broad; includes FX losses and other finance expenses, so only a fallback if no cleaner interest line exists.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses on debts and borrowings
candidates.why: Most direct match to interest expense.
Too broad/ambiguous; may include non-interest finance costs.
Interest expense but narrower than total borrowing interest; secondary fallback.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; less preferable than primary statement line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses on debts and borrowings

variables.notes: Priority list uses the cleanest primary interest expense line first, then lease-interest line, then broad financial expenses as fallback if statement labeling changes.

candidates.why: Equity component only, not total book equity.
Equity component only, not total book equity.
Potential equity total, but sparse and less reliable than explicit parent-equity line.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to the equity holders of parent company
candidates.why: Best match because BE should exclude non-controlling interests when MIB is mapped separately.
Includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred when owner/parent equity is available.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to the equity holders of parent company

variables.notes: Preferred parent-attributable equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement allocation line, not balance sheet minority equity.

candidates.row_label: Profit for the period excluding non-controlling interest
candidates.why: Not minority interest balance sheet item.
Correct concept but appears empty in preview; usable only as fallback.
Direct balance sheet minority equity line.

variables.notes: Used balance sheet non-controlling interests first; included alternate balance sheet minority-interest label as fallback.
